steps.step1_desc: Please check if your desired filming schedule is available through the Kakao Channel 'FitGirls' first.
steps.step2_desc: After checking the schedule, proceed with the Naver reservation via the guided link.
steps.step3_desc: Pay the deposit (90,000 KRW) via 'Toss Order' notification or account transfer to complete the reservation.

reservation.final_notice: ✅ Once the reservation is confirmed, we will send you detailed filming preparation guides. 💖✨

before_reservation.question: How do I make a reservation?
before_reservation.answer: Make a reservation through Naver Reservation. After consultation, pay the deposit (90,000 KRW) to confirm.

before_reservation.question: Can I cancel or change the date?
before_reservation.answer: Free changes are possible once up to 50 days before filming. Full deposit refund for cancellations 50 days before filming. Penalty applies from 49 days or same-day cancellation.

before_shooting.question: What time should I arrive?
before_shooting.answer: Arrival 30 minutes before the reservation time is the principle for outfit changes and preparation. Late arrival by 1 minute will automatically cancel the reservation without a refund.

before_shooting.question: Can I bring friends or pets?
before_shooting.answer: Maximum of 2 companions allowed. You can also bring pets for free filming together.

after_shooting.question: When can I receive edited photos?
after_shooting.answer: Raw files are sent via email on the day of filming. After you select photos, it takes about a month for the first draft of edits.

reviews.title: REAL REVIEWS
reviews.subtitle: Proven Quality of FITGIRLS by Real Clients

ai_summary.title: AI Summary
ai_summary.bullet1: Professional directing that makes posing natural even for beginners
ai_summary.bullet2: Extreme satisfaction with delicate retouching and high-quality results
ai_summary.bullet3: Diverse concepts available and high-quality rental outfits

review1.author: jm47
review1.text: It was my first body profile shoot, and the photographer lived up to the reputation. I wasn't fully prepared with outfits, poses, or concepts, but the moment the photographer saw me, he guided me perfectly. I am extremely satisfied! I plan to visit again after building a better body! He catches every detail vividly, so I will definitely come back!

review2.author: JaeHee43
review2.text: Above all, the photographer was so nice!! I was very nervous before the shoot, but he directed me so kindly and captured amazing angles and compositions. The results are some of my prettiest. I was so comfortable that the photoshoot felt like hanging out at a friend's house. Strongly recommended!
